title: When global markets move, onchain markets now move with them
message_html: When global markets move, onchain markets now move with them ...
snippet: Ondo Finance (@OndoFinance): When global markets move, onchain markets now move with them. Today's trending tokenized energy stocks: 1. Chevron (CVXon) 2. Petrobras (PBRon) 3.
